vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2019-10906
vulnerabilities.description: Older Jinja2 versions may allow sandbox escape or template-related cross-site scripting patterns in unsafe usage. This is a sample SCA finding for training.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2017-18342
vulnerabilities.description: PyYAML load may deserialize untrusted objects when unsafe loaders are used. This is a sample SCA finding.
